text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I drop by the park to take a breather from work,
when...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I've got a changeup comin' atcha next! Hup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shwip... Thwack!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Nice, looks like I'm getting the hang of it!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm loving these pitches of yours! This match is as
good as yours.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The younger students are gonna love this—you'll
be so cool in their eyes! ♪ Man, I'm already
jealous!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Me? I dunno...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was cheerin' me on in my last race, but I
still lost.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'm not as cool as they make me out to be.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: But, Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, wipe that worried look off your face! I don't
plan on throwing in the towel!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I've been doing twice as many sets at the gym to
make up for it! Just gotta keep up the grind till
my next race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If I wanna live up to what everyone thinks of me,
then I'll need to put in the reps!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey-hey! Give me another one, will ya? Every ball
you throw is going in this glove!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, sure...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Here it comes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fwoosh... Thwack!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Great pitch! You put some real feeling into that
one!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You really are super cool, Ryan! When you run,
when you're hard at work, and... just all the time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You're good at everything you try your hand at.
That's what makes you so cool!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But... sometimes you get stuck in your own head
when things don't go your way.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Still, you always get back on your feet. You work
hard every day, filled with as much enthusiasm as
the day before!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You're plenty cool just the way you are. That's
why everyone loves you, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Just the way I am, huh...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yup! That's coming from me, so you know it's the
truth!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! I guess so!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I wonder if everyone feels the same way.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Well, I think you're cool when you run, when you push your limits—geez, even your smile is cool! You're so cool you've got me swooning! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa, hey now... It's kinda embarrassing to
be complimented so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's important to listen to words of support with
an open heart—especially for an Umamusume
with such vocal fans.
